title: Printable acquisition templates for handwriting and drawing tasks in the PECT-Tecnocampus cognitive impairment study
author: Faundez-Zanuy, Marcos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Printable acquisition templates used in the PECT-Tecnocampus study on cognitive impairment detection from frontal camera scenes during handwriting tasks. The experimental protocol used two DIN A4 sheets, one for handwriting tasks and one for drawing tasks performed on a Wacom Cintiq tablet. The drawing template included pentagon copying, house copying, spring drawing, Archimedean spiral, concentric circles, and a straight line task. These files are provided as supplementary acquisition material for protocol documentation and reproducibility.
